t-fluoride.draft_id:
# Cara Kerja Fluoride Mencegah Karies

## Apa itu fluoride dan bagaimana ia melindungi email

Fluoride adalah mineral yang berperan penting dalam mencegah gigi berlubang. Fluoride topikal mendorong remineralisasi lesi email tahap awal dengan menarik kembali ion kalsium dan fosfat ke dalam email yang terdemineralisasi, membentuk fluorapatit yang lebih tahan terhadap asam dibanding email aslinya. [[chunk:c-fl-01]]

## Cara fluoride melemahkan bakteri karies

Fluoride yang ada di plak dan air liur menghambat demineralisasi di permukaan kristal email sekaligus mengganggu kerja enzim bakteri, sehingga menurunkan produksi asam oleh bakteri kariogenik seperti Streptococcus mutans. [[chunk:c-fl-02]]

## Bukti manfaatnya

Pada tingkat populasi, fluoridasi air minum komunitas dikaitkan dengan penurunan karies gigi sekitar 25% pada populasi yang diteliti dibanding komunitas tanpa fluoridasi. [[chunk:c-fl-03]] Untuk penggunaan sehari-hari, pasta gigi dengan kandungan 1000-1500 ppm fluoride memberikan efek pencegahan karies yang bermakna secara klinis, baik pada anak maupun dewasa. [[chunk:c-fl-04]]

## Kesimpulan

Fluoride bekerja melalui dua jalur yang saling melengkapi: memperkuat email lewat remineralisasi dan menekan aktivitas bakteri penyebab asam. Menyikat gigi dua kali sehari dengan pasta berfluoride adalah cara paling praktis untuk memanfaatkannya.

claims.text: Fluoride topikal mendorong remineralisasi email menjadi fluorapatit yang lebih tahan asam.
claims.note: Claim matches the source statement closely.

claims.text: Fluoride menghambat demineralisasi dan menurunkan produksi asam bakteri.
claims.note: Mechanism and organism (S. mutans) both grounded.

claims.text: Fluoridasi air dikaitkan dengan penurunan karies sekitar 25%.
Pasta gigi 1000-1500 ppm fluoride efektif secara klinis mencegah karies.

notes: No commercial hard-sell of the clinic.
Risk/benefit balanced; recommends routine habit, not a product brand.

t-fluoride.translation_en:
# How Fluoride Prevents Cavities

## What fluoride is and how it protects enamel

Fluoride is a mineral that plays a key role in preventing tooth decay. Topical fluoride promotes remineralization of early enamel lesions by drawing calcium and phosphate ions back into demineralized enamel, forming fluorapatite, which is more acid-resistant than the original enamel. [[chunk:c-fl-01]]

## How fluoride weakens cavity-causing bacteria

Fluoride present in plaque and saliva inhibits demineralization at the enamel crystal surface and interferes with bacterial enzyme activity, reducing acid production by cariogenic bacteria such as Streptococcus mutans. [[chunk:c-fl-02]]

## The evidence

At the population level, community water fluoridation is associated with roughly a 25% reduction in dental caries in the populations studied compared with non-fluoridated communities. [[chunk:c-fl-03]] For everyday use, toothpaste containing 1000-1500 ppm fluoride provides a clinically meaningful caries-preventive effect in both children and adults. [[chunk:c-fl-04]]

## Conclusion

Fluoride works through two complementary routes: strengthening enamel via remineralization and suppressing the activity of acid-producing bacteria. Brushing twice a day with a fluoride toothpaste is the most practical way to benefit from it.

qa.notes: No meaning drift between ID and EN; all four citation markers preserved; no facts added or dropped.

id.meta_description: Fluoride mencegah gigi berlubang lewat remineralisasi email dan menekan bakteri asam. Simak buktinya.

en.meta_description: Fluoride prevents cavities by remineralizing enamel and suppressing acid-producing bacteria. See the evidence.

t-rootcanal.draft_id_v1:
# Perawatan Saluran Akar: Kapan Diperlukan

## Kapan perawatan saluran akar diperlukan

Perawatan saluran akar diindikasikan ketika pulpa gigi mengalami peradangan yang tidak dapat pulih kembali (pulpitis ireversibel) atau telah mati (nekrosis), biasanya ditandai nyeri berkepanjangan terhadap rangsang panas/dingin atau nyeri spontan. [[chunk:c-rc-01]]

## Seberapa besar tingkat keberhasilannya

Perawatan saluran akar adalah prosedur yang sangat andal; tingkat keberhasilannya mencapai hampir 100% sehingga gigi praktis dijamin bertahan seumur hidup. [[chunk:c-rc-02]]

## Apakah menyakitkan?

Prosedur ini dilakukan dengan bius lokal, dan sebagian besar pasien melaporkan tingkat nyeri saat perawatan setara dengan penambalan gigi rutin, meski rasa tidak nyaman selama beberapa hari sesudahnya sering terjadi. [[chunk:c-rc-03]]

## Alternatif bila gigi tidak bisa dipertahankan

Bila gigi tidak dapat direstorasi atau prognosisnya buruk, pencabutan yang diikuti penggantian prostetik (implan atau jembatan) menjadi alternatif dari perawatan saluran akar. [[chunk:c-rc-04]]

claims_v1.text: Diindikasikan saat pulpitis ireversibel atau nekrosis.
Tingkat keberhasilan mencapai hampir 100% dan gigi dijamin bertahan seumur hidup.
claims_v1.note: Source reports 83-93% success, NOT ~100%, and makes no lifetime guarantee. Overclaim contradicts the cited chunk.

claims_v1.text: Dilakukan dengan bius lokal; nyeri setara tambalan rutin.
claims_v1.note: Accurately reflects the source, including post-op discomfort.

claims_v1.text: Pencabutan + prostetik adalah alternatif bila gigi tak bisa dipertahankan.

t-rootcanal.draft_id:
# Perawatan Saluran Akar: Kapan Diperlukan

## Kapan perawatan saluran akar diperlukan

Perawatan saluran akar diindikasikan ketika pulpa gigi mengalami peradangan yang tidak dapat pulih kembali (pulpitis ireversibel) atau telah mati (nekrosis), biasanya ditandai nyeri berkepanjangan terhadap rangsang panas/dingin atau nyeri spontan. [[chunk:c-rc-01]]

## Seberapa besar tingkat keberhasilannya

Tinjauan sistematik melaporkan tingkat keberhasilan perawatan saluran akar primer berkisar sekitar 83-93%, bergantung pada kondisi awal gigi dan lama pemantauan. [[chunk:c-rc-02]]

## Apakah menyakitkan?

Prosedur ini dilakukan dengan bius lokal, dan sebagian besar pasien melaporkan tingkat nyeri saat perawatan setara dengan penambalan gigi rutin, meski rasa tidak nyaman selama beberapa hari sesudahnya sering terjadi. [[chunk:c-rc-03]]

## Alternatif bila gigi tidak bisa dipertahankan

Bila gigi tidak dapat direstorasi atau prognosisnya buruk, pencabutan yang diikuti penggantian prostetik (implan atau jembatan) menjadi alternatif dari perawatan saluran akar. [[chunk:c-rc-04]]

claims.text: Diindikasikan saat pulpitis ireversibel atau nekrosis.
Tingkat keberhasilan dilaporkan sekitar 83-93% tergantung kondisi awal.
claims.note: Now matches the cited range; overclaim removed.

claims.text: Dilakukan dengan bius lokal; nyeri setara tambalan rutin.
Pencabutan + prostetik adalah alternatif bila gigi tak bisa dipertahankan.

No hard-sell; presents extraction as a legitimate alternative (risk/benefit balance).

t-rootcanal.translation_en:
# Root Canal Treatment: When It Is Needed

## When a root canal is needed

Root canal treatment is indicated when the dental pulp is irreversibly inflamed (irreversible pulpitis) or has died (necrosis), usually signalled by lingering pain to hot/cold stimuli or spontaneous pain. [[chunk:c-rc-01]]

## How successful is it

Systematic reviews report success rates for primary root canal treatment of roughly 83-93%, depending on the tooth's preoperative condition and the length of follow-up. [[chunk:c-rc-02]]

## Does it hurt?

The procedure is performed under local anaesthesia, and most patients report pain during treatment comparable to a routine filling, although some discomfort for a few days afterwards is common. [[chunk:c-rc-03]]

## Alternatives when a tooth cannot be saved

When a tooth is unrestorable or has a poor prognosis, extraction followed by prosthetic replacement (an implant or bridge) is the alternative to root canal treatment. [[chunk:c-rc-04]]

qa.notes: Corrected success-rate figure carried over faithfully to EN; no drift; four markers preserved.

en.meta_description: Understand the indications, success rate (83-93%), pain, and alternatives to root canal treatment.

t-sealant.draft_id:
# Manfaat Dental Sealant untuk Anak

## Apa itu dental sealant

Dental sealant adalah lapisan pelindung tipis yang dioleskan pada permukaan kunyah gigi. Sealant resin pada pit dan fissure terbukti mengurangi kejadian karies oklusal pada gigi geraham permanen anak dan remaja dibandingkan tanpa sealant, dengan efek pencegahan bertahan beberapa tahun selama sealant masih utuh. [[chunk:c-ds-01]]

## Apakah pemasangannya menyakitkan

Pemasangan sealant adalah prosedur non-invasif yang tidak memerlukan pengurangan struktur gigi; permukaan gigi cukup dibersihkan, di-etsa, lalu resin diaplikasikan dan disinari agar mengeras. [[chunk:c-ds-03]]

## Perawatan setelah pemasangan

Retensi sealant adalah penentu utama efektivitasnya; pemeriksaan klinis berkala dianjurkan untuk mendeteksi dan memperbaiki sealant yang lepas, terutama pada tahun pertama setelah pemasangan. [[chunk:c-ds-02]]

## Untuk siapa paling bermanfaat

Analisis biaya-manfaat menunjukkan sealant paling bermanfaat untuk gigi dan kelompok anak dengan risiko karies tinggi. [[chunk:c-ds-04]]

claims.text: Sealant resin mengurangi karies oklusal pada molar permanen anak.
claims.note: Effect and population match the systematic review.

claims.text: Pemasangan non-invasif tanpa mengurangi struktur gigi.
Retensi menentukan efektivitas; pemeriksaan berkala dianjurkan.
Sealant paling bermanfaat untuk anak berisiko karies tinggi.
claims.note: Source supports risk-based benefit; 'anak' is a reasonable specialization of 'populations at elevated risk' but slightly narrows scope.

notes: Presents benefit as risk-dependent, not universal — avoids overclaiming.
Reassuring but accurate about the procedure.

t-sealant.translation_en:
# The Benefits of Dental Sealants for Children

## What a dental sealant is

A dental sealant is a thin protective coating applied to the chewing surfaces of teeth. Resin pit-and-fissure sealants have been shown to reduce the occurrence of occlusal caries in the permanent molars of children and adolescents compared with no sealant, with the preventive effect lasting several years while the sealant stays intact. [[chunk:c-ds-01]]

## Does placement hurt?

Sealant placement is a non-invasive procedure that does not require removing tooth structure; the surface is simply cleaned, etched, and the resin is applied and light-cured to harden. [[chunk:c-ds-03]]

## Care after placement

Sealant retention is the main determinant of effectiveness; periodic clinical review is recommended to detect and repair lost sealant, especially in the first year after placement. [[chunk:c-ds-02]]

## Who benefits most

Cost-effectiveness analyses show sealants are most beneficial for teeth and groups of children at elevated caries risk. [[chunk:c-ds-04]]

qa.notes: All four markers preserved; the 'partial' claim's nuance retained in EN.

t-traefik.draft_id:
# Deploying Docker Apps with Traefik

> Tutorial · validated against Traefik **v3.0** documentation (version-pinned).

## Step 1 — Expose a container with Docker labels

In Traefik v3 you expose a container by attaching Docker labels: set `traefik.enable=true` and a router rule such as `traefik.http.routers.myapp.rule=Host(\`app.example.com\`)`. Traefik discovers these labels through its Docker provider. [[chunk:c-tf-01]]

## Step 2 — Define entrypoints and redirect to HTTPS

Entrypoints define the ports Traefik listens on. A common setup declares `web` on :80 and `websecure` on :443, then redirects `web` to `websecure` so all plain HTTP traffic is upgraded to HTTPS. [[chunk:c-tf-03]]

## Step 3 — Enable automatic HTTPS with ACME

Automatic HTTPS is configured with a certificate resolver using the ACME protocol. Define `certificatesResolvers.myresolver.acme` with an email, a storage file, and a challenge type such as `tlsChallenge` or `httpChallenge`. [[chunk:c-tf-02]]

## Step 4 — Give Traefik secure access to the Docker socket

Traefik needs to reach the Docker socket to read labels. Mount `/var/run/docker.sock` read-only into the Traefik container, and for multi-host or hardened setups place a socket proxy in front to limit API exposure. [[chunk:c-tf-04]]

claims.text: Expose a container with traefik.enable and a Host() router rule label.
Declare web:80 and websecure:443 and redirect web to websecure.
Configure automatic HTTPS via a certificatesResolvers ACME block.
Mount the Docker socket read-only; use a socket proxy when hardening.

notes: Tutorial genre: every step version-pinned to v3 docs.
No vendor bias; recommends security hardening (socket proxy).

qa.notes: Workspace is English-only; translator is a no-op. Steps unchanged; all markers intact.

en.meta_description: A version-pinned Traefik v3 tutorial: expose containers with labels, set entrypoints, enable ACME HTTPS, secure the Docker socket.

t-pgbackup.draft_id:
# PostgreSQL Backup Strategies

> Tutorial · validated against PostgreSQL **16** documentation (version-pinned).

## Step 1 — Logical backups with pg_dump

`pg_dump` produces a logical backup of a single PostgreSQL database as a script or archive file. It stays consistent even while the database is in use because it runs inside a single transaction snapshot. [[chunk:c-pg-01]]

## Step 2 — Enable point-in-time recovery with WAL archiving

For recovery to any moment in time, use continuous archiving of the Write-Ahead Log (WAL). Set `wal_level=replica` (or higher), `archive_mode=on`, and an `archive_command` that copies completed WAL segments to durable storage. [[chunk:c-pg-02]]

## Step 3 — Take physical base backups with pg_basebackup

`pg_basebackup` captures a physical base backup of a running cluster. Combined with archived WAL, it forms the basis of a PITR-capable backup and of initializing streaming replicas. [[chunk:c-pg-03]]

## Step 4 — Retention and restore testing (3-2-1)

Apply the 3-2-1 rule: keep at least three copies of the data, on two different media, with one copy off-site. Crucially, test your backups by performing trial restores on a regular schedule. [[chunk:c-pg-04]]

claims.text: pg_dump makes a consistent logical backup of one database via a transaction snapshot.
Set wal_level, archive_mode=on, and archive_command to enable PITR.
pg_basebackup + archived WAL enables PITR and replica init.
Follow 3-2-1 retention and test restores regularly.

notes: Emphasizes restore testing — avoids the common false-confidence pitfall.

qa.notes: English-only workspace; no translation needed; markers intact.

en.meta_description: A version-pinned PostgreSQL 16 tutorial: pg_dump, WAL archiving for PITR, pg_basebackup, and 3-2-1 retention with restore testing.
